doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document’s specific legal citations and referenced external materials appear unverifiable and inconsistent with how official Florida Department of State memoranda are typically constituted.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 84
REASON: The memo cites specific statutes (e.g., §98.0751(2)(a)(5)), a “2023 federal-district-court guidance on practical-impossibility of LFO-tracking,” and “Florida Auditor General's 2024 report” with details that are not verifiable from the text and appear inconsistent with known Florida legal/administrative materials.
